action.reasoning: Observation: FP+MLP stable at test AP~0.161-0.163 (val AP plateau ~0.176) after 50 epochs; train.py was truncated but completed; model small (512-dim/3-layer). PyG still segfaults so no GNN. Analysis: Larger model (1024-dim/4-layer, dropout=0.1), full non-truncated train.py with complete batch loop + grad clipping + per-epoch jsonl logging (loss/val_ap/lr) + longer training (80 epochs) + patience=4 scheduler will allow better convergence without NaNs (no BN). This should recover and exceed prior best 0.1633. Decision: Update model.py (new arch defaults), fully rewrite complete train.py (robust logging, clipping, 80 epochs), update predict.py for new defaults; train then submit_eval on best.pt.
